figure: Figure 5: Selective environmental value and feature-group importance

panel_a.delta_convention: comparator minus E1; negative is better
checks: All five comparators and three horizons are uniquely present.
Delta MAE is uniformly comparator minus E1; negative is better.
Every point estimate lies within its moving-block bootstrap CI.
Confidence intervals use the frozen 24-hour moving-block bootstrap with 5000 repetitions.

panel_b.scale_selection_reason: all values are strictly positive and max/min ≥ 100
panel_b.ordering_rule: descending mean importance across 1 h, 3 h and 6 h
checks: Overall_test contains seven feature groups at all three horizons.
All permutation-importance means and SDs are aggregated across five seeds.
Importance x-axis selected automatically: log (all values are strictly positive and max/min ≥ 100).
Feature groups share the same Overall_test sample count within each horizon.
